items.title: LLM orchestration & multi-agent systems
items.description: Agent workflows that survive contact with production — LLM orchestration and chaining, autonomous task decomposition, supervisor–worker routing, structured output parsing, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints.

items.title: RAG pipelines & vector search
items.description: Retrieval that returns the right context — embeddings, semantic chunking, hybrid retrieval and re-ranking over FAISS, Pinecone, Milvus, and Qdrant, wired into RAG-powered tools.

items.title: Backend & API platforms
items.description: Maintainable, production-ready services that scale — Python (Django, FastAPI) and Go (Fiber), microservices, Celery task queues, async I/O, on PostgreSQL and Redis.

items.title: Local AI & automation
items.description: Self-hosted, open-source AI in production — local Hermes Agent (Nous Research) deployments wired into social and marketing automation through scheduling and API integration layers.
